title: DKN Vinyl Kettlebell
features: Strong Moulded Construction; Ergo Designed Comfort Handle;
Vinyl Coating; Anti-Slip Base; Colour Coded Weight;
Supplied with a Fully Detailed Workout Chart;
description: The DKN vinyl kettlebell is designed to help develop functional strength, endurance, core stability and tone muscles. It has a solid moulded construction and offering an anti-slip base that provides improved safety during workouts. A comfortable grip has been ensured by an ergonomically designed handle, whereas an included chart shows you how properly exercise with the kettlebell.
